---
title: ""
---

<div class="row">
<div class="col-sm-7">
<div class="home-intro">
<div class="typing-title">Hi, I'm Jamie</div>
<div class="typing-subtitle">Biostatistics & Healthcare Data | RWE & Clinical Research | R, Python, SAS</div>
<p style="opacity:0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease-in 2.5s forwards; margin-top: 15px;">
MPH Candidate in Biostatistics @ Emory University.
</p>
<p style="opacity:0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease-in 3s forwards; margin-top: 8px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 0.95em;">
A biostatistics researcher using real-world data and survival analysis to answer <em>what treatment works for whom</em>. Currently working across the full RWE pipeline in clinical research, and building toward drug development and post-market evaluation — to become an applied biostatistician who supports the journey from study design to real-world impact.
</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-sm-5" style="text-align: center; padding-top: 20px;">
<img src="images/profile.png" class="profile-photo" />
</div>
</div>

<div class="forest-nav">
<h3>Explore My World</h3>
</div>

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(plotly)

sections <- data.frame(
  label = c("Education", "Work", "Projects", "CV", "Interests"),
  estimate = c(0.85, 0.70, 0.60, 0.45, 1.15),
  lower = c(0.40, 0.25, 0.15, 0.05, 0.65),
  upper = c(1.30, 1.15, 1.05, 0.85, 1.65),
  desc = c("Courses & academics",
           "Professional experience",
           "What I've built",
           "Download my resume",
           "The human behind the CV"),
  url = c("about.html", "work.html", "projects.html",
          "files/JiaminZhao_CV.pdf", "interests.html"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

sections$y <- rev(seq_len(nrow(sections)))

p <- plot_ly() %>%
  # CI lines
  add_segments(
    data = sections,
    x = ~lower, xend = ~upper, y = ~y, yend = ~y,
    line = list(color = "#2C3E50", width = 3),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverinfo = "none"
  ) %>%
  # Point estimates
  add_markers(
    data = sections,
    x = ~estimate, y = ~y,
    marker = list(color = "#2C3E50", size = 14, symbol = "diamond"),
    text = ~paste0("<b>", label, "</b><br>", desc, "<br><i>Click to explore</i>"),
    hoverinfo = "text",
    customdata = ~url,
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) %>%
  # Null line
  add_segments(
    x = 0, xend = 0, y = 0.5, yend = nrow(sections) + 0.5,
    line = list(color = "#666", width = 1, dash = "dash"),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverinfo = "none"
  ) %>%
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      zeroline = FALSE,
      showgrid = FALSE,
      showticklabels = FALSE,
      range = c(-0.5, 2),
      fixedrange = TRUE
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      tickvals = sections$y,
      ticktext = sections$label,
      tickfont = list(size = 14, color = "#333"),
      showgrid = FALSE,
      zeroline = FALSE,
      fixedrange = TRUE
    ),
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    margin = list(l = 120, r = 40, t = 10, b = 30),
    height = 280,
    dragmode = FALSE
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      el.on('plotly_click', function(data) {
        var url = data.points[0].customdata;
        if (url) { window.location.href = url; }
      });
      el.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    }
  ")

p
```
